links.title: View Detailed Logs
links.tooltip: Click to view detailed application logs

panels.title: Spark Application Log Counts
panels.description: Aggregated count of Spark application log entries by log level. Click on data points to view detailed logs.

panels.title: Total Network Byte Rate (In/Out)
panels.description: Aggregated network I/O rates across all hosts. Stacked view shows total cluster throughput.

targets.query: _index:metrics-system.network-default* AND NOT system.network.name:lo AND NOT system.network.name:veth* AND NOT system.network.name:docker* AND NOT system.network.name:br-* AND NOT system.network.name:virbr* AND _exists_:system.network.in.bytes_rate

_index:metrics-system.network-default* AND NOT system.network.name:lo AND NOT system.network.name:veth* AND NOT system.network.name:docker* AND NOT system.network.name:br-* AND NOT system.network.name:virbr* AND _exists_:system.network.out.bytes_rate

panels.title: Total Network Byte Rate (In/Out) - Logstash
panels.description: Aggregated network I/O rates using precomputed rates from Logstash aggregate filter

targets.query: _index:metrics-system.diskio-default* AND system.diskio.name:(nvme* OR sd* OR vd*)
_index:metrics-system.diskio-default* AND system.diskio.name:(nvme* OR sd* OR vd*)

panels.title: Total Disk I/O Rate (Read/Write)
panels.description: Aggregated disk I/O rates across all hosts. Stacked view shows total cluster I/O.

targets.query: _index:metrics-system.diskio-default* AND system.diskio.name:(nvme* OR sd* OR vd*) AND _exists_:system.diskio.read.bytes_rate
_index:metrics-system.diskio-default* AND system.diskio.name:(nvme* OR sd* OR vd*) AND _exists_:system.diskio.write.bytes_rate

panels.title: Total Disk I/O Rate (Read/Write) - Logstash
panels.description: Aggregated disk I/O rates using precomputed rates from Logstash aggregate filter

panels.title: Total System Load Average (1-minute)
panels.description: Total 1-minute load average across all hosts. For Default granularity. For 5m/15m/60m granularities, this represents the smoothed load over those intervals.

panels.title: GPU Metrics (Utilization & Temperature)
panels.description: Tracks AMD GPU utilization, VRAM usage, and edge temperature across Lab1/Lab2 nodes
